name: Closed for Inventory
text:
During each opponent's turn, the first time they would roll a die or flip a coin, instead a sign goes up reading "BACK IN 5 MINUTES" and that roll or flip doesn't happen. (It is never 5 minutes.)
At the beginning of your upkeep, you may turn the sign around to read "OPEN" to draw a card, then it flips back.
flavorText: The clock taped to the door has read 5 minutes from now for as long as anyone can remember.

extras.parasitic: denies opponents' first roll/flip each turn
